visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a patterned dress and a beige coat with fur trim, stands in a brightly lit warehouse aisle. She holds two large, cylindrical decorative tins shaped like nutcrackers. The background is filled with yellow product boxes on metal industrial shelves. (2) Close-up shot of several nutcracker-themed tins arranged on a retail shelf. One tin is shaped like a mouse king with a purple coat and white face, and others are traditional soldier nutcrackers. A yellow price tag is visible on the shelf edge. (3) The woman is seen again, now holding three tins in her arms, showing them to the camera. She smiles and speaks directly to the lens, moving the tins slightly to show different angles. (4) Close-up focus on the lids of the tins. The mouse king has a rounded, dome-shaped lid, while the soldier nutcrackers have flat lids. The textures of the printed metal are visible. (5) The woman continues to hold the tins, gesturing toward them with her free hand. She appears to be laughing and reacting to someone off-camera. A person walks briefly in the far background aisle. (6) A hand enters the frame from the right side and gives a thumbs-up gesture in front of the nutcracker tins held by the woman.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 義大利製造459元!. [Slogan]: 胡桃鉗穀物牛奶巧克力. (2) [Subtitle]: 459元裡面有350克. (3) [Subtitle]: 它有三個造型 超可愛的. (4) [Subtitle]: 有胡桃鉗王子 鼠王. (5) [Subtitle]: 超多鼠王在這裡 跟費里茲耶. (6) [Subtitle]: 超級無敵. (7) [Subtitle]: 這是多少人的童年吶. (8) [Subtitle]: 我最近還在找那個芭比的藍光 DVD. (9) [Subtitle]: 如果大家有連結可以告訴我. (10) [Subtitle]: 對 可以告訴他哪裡買 他超想看. (11) [Subtitle]: 好想看啊. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後我覺得他這做的很可愛. (13) [Subtitle]: 因為你看鼠王 他這個頭是有點 那種圓弧形的帽子. (14) [Subtitle]: 然後另外兩個啊 都是平的. (15) [Subtitle]: 然後這蓋子好好看哦. (16) [Variety]: 很節慶氛圍. [Subtitle]: 它的配色 你看這個紅金藍的搭配哦. (17) [Subtitle]: 然後這個黑色也黑的 它是藍黑色的. (18) [Subtitle]: 好美. (19) [Subtitle]: 就是聖誕節 你就算不吃裡面東西 放那旁邊哦. (20) [Variety]: 氛圍滿滿. [Subtitle]: 我覺得好市多鐵罐都是做得 非常誠意又很好看. (21) [Subtitle]: 以外觀來說它非常OK 然後來自義大利. (22) [Subtitle]: 義大利巧克力就是好吃. (23) [Subtitle]: 家裡有拜拜的也很適合. (24) [Subtitle]: 什麼意思. (25) [Subtitle]: 因為你們平常香就可以放裡面. (26) [Subtitle]: 差不多長度吧. (27) [Subtitle]: 謝謝大家.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the foreground, 1 male passerby briefly visible in the background around 10 seconds.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long, straight black hair, wearing a beige fur-lined jacket over a brown and white patterned dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Interior of a large warehouse-style store with high ceilings, industrial metal shelving units stacked high with yellow and red boxes, and a wide polished concrete floor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice introduces the chocolate product with a bright, enthusiastic pitch and fast speech rate. Upbeat electronic BGM with a strong rhythmic beat begins immediately and continues as a background layer. (2) A male voice enters the mix, engaging in a conversational, humorous banter with the female speaker. There is significant overlapping of voices and music, maintaining a lively atmosphere. (3) A distinct 'pop' or bubble-style sound effect triggers a transition in the dialogue. The vocal tone of both speakers is high in valence and arousal, characterized by frequent laughter and rising intonations. (4) The BGM remains steady with synthesized textures while the speakers discuss details of the tin cans, with incidental muffled sounds of object handling occasionally audible beneath the clear dialogue.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Features Highlight -> Personal Anecdote -> Comparison -> Humorous Recommendation -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional product showcase and review, intended to share the discovery of festive Nutcracker-themed chocolate tins at Costco. It leverages the host's high-energy delivery and conversational chemistry with an off-screen partner to highlight the item's visual appeal and value for money, targeting viewers interested in seasonal retail finds.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase within a retail environment, highlighting price and features as a recommendation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social-media style editing with high text density and rhythmic pacing likely intended for short-form video platforms.
